resonance_events.excerpt: I knew it was not my voice... strangely coming from both within and outside.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: This is heaven, because you don't have to change anything.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Our models of what constitutes 'mind,' 'matter,' 'world,' and 'soul' are incomplete.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Don't say 'Stop' to anything that comes. And don't say 'Stop' to anything that goes.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Beschreibt eine lebensverändernde Erfahrung auf einem benachbarten Berg (Parvathamalai) nach dem Besuch von Tiruvannamalai.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Dokumentiert eine auditive Erfahrung (eine Stimme), die sowohl innerlich als auch äußerlich wahrgenommen wurde.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Berichtet von körperlichen Reaktionen wie Zittern und Schweiß vor Angst vor dem Wahnsinn.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Thematisiert die Erkenntnis der radikalen Akzeptanz ("Himmel") im Gegensatz zum Veränderungswillen ("Hölle").
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Beschreibt das Treffen mit einem alten Mann, der laut anderen Zeugen physisch nicht anwesend war.
resonance_events.notes: summary_point; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: The one experience that changed my attitude
